word: G5352 - φθινοπωρινός - phthinopōrinós - fthin-op-o-ree-nos' - Whose fruit withereth

sections.paragraph:
φθινοπωρινός - phthinopōrinos - fthin-op-o-ree-nos'

From a derivative of φθίνω phthinō (to wane; akin to the base of G5351) and G3703 (meaning late autumn) autumnal (as stripped of leaves): - whose fruit withereth.
